name: bun-sql-executor-choice
question: Which database driver/executor should we use for SQL execution?
decision: Use Bun.sql native driver via programmatic tagged template invocation pattern: split SQL on $N placeholders, call sql(parts, ...params)
rationale: Zero dependencies (built into Bun), native C performance, built-in pooling/transactions/savepoints, multi-database support (Postgres/MySQL/SQLite), already using Bun runtime. Research validated the tagged template trick works identically to normal template usage.
